lint.note: Repository lint command in .factory/services.yaml is a no-op placeholder.

build.note: Additional validation run per repository instructions.

blockingIssues.description: src/i18n/converter.ts pairs SC and TC strings of unequal lengths (1305 vs 1308), producing corrupted zh-TW conversions such as `潜 -> 誌`, `菜单 -> 綠單`, and `翠绿 -> 翠潛`.

src/i18n/index.ts imports a static locales/zh-TW.ts snapshot; production never generates zh-TW from zh-CN via convertToTraditional(), and the checked-in file has already drifted from converter output.
src/scenes/MenuScene.ts builds the Continue label from AllClasses[save.classId].name, so English and zh-TW continue buttons still show Simplified Chinese class names (`战士`/`法师`/`盗贼`).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a concrete zh-TW regeneration workflow (script/command) or a sanctioned post-generation fixup step instead of only saying zh-TW must never be hand-edited.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both `i18n-core-module` and `i18n-menu-scene` reviews found that workers manually corrected or drifted `src/i18n/locales/zh-TW.ts` because the repo has no production regeneration step beyond the converter module.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make TDD and agent-browser verification conditional on feature type, separating core-module work from scene/UI extraction so validators can rely on existing unit coverage and code inspection when browser checks are not meaningful.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both reviewed worker sessions deviated from the current skill: the core-module feature never needed scene-level browser interaction, and the menu-scene feature completed without agent-browser despite the skill making it mandatory.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit rule to stage only feature-owned files and never blanket-stage `.factory/` or other shared validation directories.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Transcript session `8a73cbec-670b-4ff1-ba53-f5790a1abbfc` staged `.factory/` wholesale, and commit `8a17fec9cbe8600e03f92687621d689ae1f7744a` included unrelated validation artifacts from other milestones.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update `.factory/library` now to describe the current manual zh-TW correction process.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because the current workflow is under scrutiny failure and belongs in orchestrator guidance or a future fix feature, not stable reference material.

rejectedObservations.observation: Treat the menu-scene review's zh-TW workflow mismatch as a separate guidance item from the core-module regeneration-gap note.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the broader zh-TW workflow guidance recommendation already captured above.

rejectedObservations.observation: Treat the menu-scene 'skill over-specifies verification' note as separate from the core-module 'UI-centric skill' note.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the combined i18n-worker skill recommendation above.
